misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1177] “Chopper Healer Of Liberation” Chopper ability is 100% from his devil fruit obviously. By him using the Rumbar Balls, he is able to do forceful awakening & use the true DF ability. See
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1177] “Chopper Healer Of Liberation” Chopper ability is 100% from his devil fruit obviously. By him using the Rumbar Balls, he is able to do forceful awakening & use the true DF ability. See if he was going through a natural awakening, it would involve his mind,haki and devil fruit being one like luffy with sun God. People think by him having this ability, it means he can cure all natural diseases & spiritual curses. But it’s only with his DF, he will just be able to cure spirit curses & liberate them with his Df. Meaning he can still go on & accomplish his dream to cure natural sicknesses in world. Cont on for the parallels I discover!

misc.title: "Wtf wasn´t the vote count 3Mio+ yesterday, now we have 11mio votes lol, little concerning about that"... I voted for “MARSHALL D. TEACH (BLACKBEARD)”! onepiecewt100-2026.com/en/vo… #ONEPIECE #ONEPIEC

misc.title: For many weeks now, the #OnePiece chapters have shown us this duality: War God vs Sun God, reptile vs thunder, union vs division and it just keeps going.. - two sides of the same coin ᗡD. - cursed pri
misc.text: For many weeks now, the #OnePiece chapters have shown us this duality: War God vs Sun God, reptile vs thunder, union vs division and it just keeps going.. - two sides of the same coin ᗡD. - cursed prince vs cursed princess ("Gorgon Curse") - Conqueror vs Celestial Dragon #ONEPIECE1177

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Wait a minute!! The Holy Knights can't regenerate their bodies while they're separated?? Please, Oda, I beg you, go with the Hidan route. All the mf Holy Knights should be buried forever
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Wait a minute!! The Holy Knights can't regenerate their bodies while they're separated?? Please, Oda, I beg you, go with the Hidan route. All the mf Holy Knights should be buried forever in dirt, never to see sunlight...
